columns.extraction_plan: Page 7, Text: "Reported use of docetaxel within 1 year after first progression was higher among patients allocated to SOC + AAP (32% SOC-alone and 40% SOC + AAP, Chi-square P = .048)." Extract "40%" as the percentage of participants in the SOC + AAP (treatment) arm who received docetaxel within 1 year of first progression. The number of participants is not explicitly stated but can be derived from other information in the document.

Page 7, Text: "Reported use of docetaxel within 1 year of first progression was higher among patients allocated to SOC + AAP (32% SOC-alone and 40% SOC + AAP, Chi-square P = .048)." Extract "32%" as the percentage of participants in the SOC-alone (control) arm who received docetaxel within 1 year of first progression. The number of participants is not explicitly stated but can be derived from other information in the document.
